name: Reservoir Capital Corp.
description: Reservoir Capital Corp. is a Canada-based principal investment firm focused on the renewable energy sector. The company concentrates on acquiring minority stakes in operational power projects located in emerging markets. Historically, the firm was involved in the acquisition, development, and exploitation of natural resource and energy opportunities in South Eastern Europe. Today, it operates as an investment vehicle dedicated to clean power, aiming to create shareholder value through strategic investments in the global energy landscape while maintaining a focus on sustainable development and operational excellence.
